alerts.title: CTR collapsed -21.84% WoW — broadcasters & OTT - US - ABM
alerts.meta: CTR fell from 0.5594% (prior 7d) to 0.4372% (current 7d), exceeding the -15% HIGH threshold. Largest campaign by spend (Rs 13,335.80). Immediate creative review required.

alerts.title: Zero leads on Rs 14,317 spend — all active campaigns
alerts.meta: No oneClickLeads or externalWebsiteConversions recorded across any campaign in the current 7-day window despite Rs 14,316.90 total spend. Funnel integrity check needed urgently.

alerts.title: Severe under-delivery — broadcasters & OTT - EU - ABM (−98.9% vs prior)
alerts.meta: Spend dropped from Rs 1,390.78 (prior 7d) to Rs 15.92 (current 7d), a 98.9% collapse. Campaign may be paused, budget exhausted, or have a delivery issue.

alerts.title: Significant under-delivery — Leagues - pulse - EU (−60.4% vs prior)
alerts.meta: Spend dropped from Rs 2,425.58 to Rs 961.51 WoW. Impressions fell from 268 to 146. Check budget caps, audience size, and bid competitiveness.

alerts.title: 2 active campaigns recorded zero spend this week
alerts.meta: Website visits - Image Ads (ID 436342446) and PULSE Lead generation - Jan 20, 2026 - US 2 (ID 511404566) have no analytics rows in the current 7-day window. Verify active status and delivery settings.

opportunities.title: Re-activate EU broadcaster spend — 158 unique users already warmed
opportunities.meta: broadcasters & OTT - EU - ABM had 158 unique impressions in the prior 7d with a Rs 6.62 CPM. The audience is primed but delivery collapsed. Restoring budget could re-engage at low cost.

opportunities.title: Leagues - pulse - EU audience under-saturated (freq 1.62) — scale budget
opportunities.meta: Frequency of 1.622 is well below the 3.5 warning threshold, indicating headroom to increase impressions. Prior 7d delivered 268 impressions; current 7d only 146. Raise daily budget to recapture reach.

opportunities.title: All lead-gen campaigns at zero conversions — audit lead form UX immediately
opportunities.meta: With Rs 14,317 spent and 0 leads across all campaigns, the issue may be a broken lead form, misaligned landing page, or audience-offer mismatch. A/B test a simpler lead form with a case-study hook.

opportunities.title: US broadcaster segment spending Rs 13,336 with declining CTR — refresh creatives now
opportunities.meta: CTR on broadcasters & OTT - US - ABM dropped 21.84% WoW. With 915 impressions and 4 clicks, creative fatigue or poor message-market fit is limiting performance. New hooks referencing HockeyOne (500% video view surge) recommended.
